name: Samsung #BeFearless Fear of Public Speaking – School Life

reviews.review_description: I got expelled for too MUCH public speaking!
I would like to download this but it keeps failing no matter what i do
It is so nice with levels and topics selection as well as recording and eye contact with virtual audience. I can better practice for public speaking.
I can't download it on my s6 please fix now I really want this game.

developer_response.body: Hello, we are sorry to hear you are having problems. The app is designed to sync with Galaxy S6 so it may be an Internet connection problem. Content may not have been fully downloaded due to weak Internet connection. Please erase the current download and try to download it again with strong Internet connection. Let us know at lp.sec@samsung.com if you keep receiving errors.

reviews.review_description: Great potential, but it doesn't recognize my voice, how hard I tried to. Please fix this.
